mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_record ( game_type, game_name, family_id, family_name, room_id, duration, participant_count, total_score, winner_name, game_data, create_time ) VALUES ( #{gameType}, #{gameName}, #{familyId}, #{familyName}, #{roomId}, #{duration}, #{participantCount}, #{totalScore}, #{winnerName}, #{gameData}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM game_record WHERE family_id = #{familyId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
